text: Brent at $114.64 and climbing. 8th straight session. The market is pricing in that Hormuz won't reopen anytime soon — Iran's proposal rejected, Trump escalating rhetoric, Treasury tightening the economic noose. Next resistance is $120. If Hegseth hearing goes badly, could spike further.
verificationNote: Price confirmed via Trading Economics. Market analysis consistent with Reuters, Bloomberg reporting.

text: HEGSETH HEARING KEY TAKEAWAY: Pentagon comptroller reveals $25B cost through 60 days — first official price tag. 45% of PrSM, ~50% THAAD/Patriot interceptors used. Seeking $200B supplemental. Democrats slam nuclear contradiction: 'obliterated' in 2025 but 'imminent threat' in 2026.
verificationNote: NPR, NBC News, Al Jazeera, Fortune all confirmed $25B figure and hearing details.

text: USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) to depart Middle East after record 10-month deployment. US carrier presence drops from 3 to 2. Lincoln and Bush remain on blockade duty. Boxer ARG with 4,200 Marines arriving to partially offset. Ford badly needs repair.
verificationNote: Washington Post, CBS News, Times of Israel confirmed Ford departure.

text: FLOTILLA INTERCEPT: Israeli Navy seizes 7 of 58 vessels of 'Global Sumud Flotilla' near Crete — 1,000+ activists on board. Communications jammed, forced boarding with lasers and semi-automatic weapons. Vessels being towed to Ashdod. Netanyahu in emergency consultations.
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog, Al Jazeera, Palestine Chronicle confirmed.

text: Brent closes at $118.03 — broke through $120 intraday. +47.8% from pre-war. Trump's 'cry uncle' rhetoric + UAE OPEC exit + prolonged blockade order. WTI $106.88. Markets now pricing in no Hormuz reopening before H2. Next test: $125 if War Powers deadline passes without action.
verificationNote: CNBC, Al-Monitor, The National confirmed price levels and market analysis.

text: Iran rial crashes to record 1.81M/USD — down 12% in one week. IMF: GDP shrink 6.1%, inflation 68.9%. Kharg Island storage 74%+ and rising. Tehran reactivating derelict tankers for floating storage. The economic noose is tightening but Iran's regional proxies remain active.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Al Jazeera (rial). Foreign Policy, Al Jazeera (Kharg storage). IMF data confirmed.

text: DAY 62 PM PT ROUNDUP: Pentagon $25B official cost. Brent $118.03 (+47.8%). USS Ford departing (carrier → 2). Gaza flotilla seized near Crete. Trump: 'cry uncle.' UAE exits OPEC May 1. Fed holds 3.5-3.75% (most dissent since '92). Iran rial record low. UN: 21 executed. War Powers deadline TOMORROW.
verificationNote: NPR, CNBC, WaPo, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, UN News. All cross-verified.

text: CENTCOM BRIEFING: Axios reports Adm. Brad Cooper briefing Trump TODAY on 3 military options: (1) 'short and powerful' wave of strikes on Iranian infrastructure, (2) plan to seize part of Hormuz potentially with ground forces, (3) special forces raid to grab Iran's HEU at Isfahan. This is why Brent just hit $126.
verificationNote: Axios scoop confirmed. JPost, CNBC citing same report. Oil price spike correlates.

text: BRENT $126.10 — NEW WARTIME HIGH. Blew through $125 resistance on CENTCOM briefing report. +57.9% from pre-war $79.84. WTI $108.51. Goldman says Hormuz exports at 4% of normal. If Trump greenlights any of the 3 CENTCOM options, we're looking at $140+ easily.
verificationNote: CNBC confirmed $126.10. Goldman Sachs 4% figure from their energy desk note.

text: HEZBOLLAH DRONE ATTACK: Explosive drone from Lebanon strikes near Shomera in Western Galilee. Vehicle ablaze, fire department responding. Interceptor fired at 2nd suspicious aerial target — results under review. Fiber-optic FPV drones immune to Israeli EW jamming confirmed as major capability gap.
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog April 30. Al Jazeera fiber-optic drone analysis.

text: IRAN WEAPON THREAT: Navy commander Rear Adm. Shahram Irani says Iran will confront enemies 'very soon' with weapon they're 'deeply afraid of' — 'could give them a heart attack.' No specifics. Could be bluff, could be anti-ship ballistic missile, could be nuclear. Timing with CENTCOM briefing is notable.
verificationNote: Press TV, India TV News confirmed statement. Interpretation speculative.

text: IAEA: Grossi says JCPOA 'cannot constitute a basis' for new Iran nuclear deal. Estimates ~200kg HEU still at Isfahan in tunnels. IAEA cannot verify — inspections ended after June 2025 attack. This is exactly what the CENTCOM HEU seizure option is targeting.
verificationNote: UN News, Foreign Policy confirmed Grossi statements at NPT review.

text: DAY 62 LATE PT ROUNDUP: Brent $126.10 wartime high (+57.9%). CENTCOM briefs Trump on 3 military options. Gas $4.23 wartime high. Israeli double-tap kills 5 in Lebanon. Hezbollah drone hits Shomera. Iran threatens new weapon. IAEA: JCPOA 'no basis.' $344M Tether frozen. War Powers deadline TOMORROW.
verificationNote: CNBC, Axios, NBC News, Euronews, Times of Israel, Press TV, UN News. All cross-verified.

text: SHOMERA UPDATE: 12 IDF soldiers wounded in Hezbollah drone strike on artillery position. M548 ammo carrier hit — secondary explosions. Key detail: fiber-optic guided drone, immune to Israel's EW jamming. This is a Ukraine-adopted tactic. IDF has no counter yet.
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog, The National confirmed details.

text: MARITIME FREEDOM CONSTRUCT: State Dept cable leaked — US pushing all allies to join coalition to forcibly reopen Hormuz. France and UK 'discussing' but both say not until conflict ends. Translation: nobody wants to fight Iran to reopen the strait.
verificationNote: US News/Reuters confirmed cable and allied reluctance.

text: KHAMENEI PERSIAN GULF DAY: Claims 'new chapter for Hormuz' after US 'humiliating defeat.' Still no video or audio — statement read on TV. Separately, Pezeshkian calls blockade 'doomed to fail.' Rezaei says Iran can use Indian Ocean to bypass. Coordinated messaging.
verificationNote: The News International, Al Arabiya, Irish Times confirmed respective statements.

text: TRUMP vs GERMANY: Threatens troop reduction after Merz said US 'being humiliated.' Rubio simultaneously calls German FM Wadephul about Hormuz. Good cop/bad cop or just chaos? EU already paying EUR 500M/day in extra energy costs per Von der Leyen. NATO cracks widening.
verificationNote: NPR (troop threat), State Dept (Rubio call), Bloomberg (Von der Leyen) confirmed.

text: NPR satellite imagery confirms what OSINT has been tracking for weeks — Israel systematically destroying southern Lebanese towns. All Litani bridges gone. Critical water infrastructure hit. Lebanon DT now 2,576. This is a mirror of the Gaza approach. 1.5M displaced.
verificationNote: NPR, WAFA confirmed. Satellite imagery analysis consistent with prior OSINT reports.

text: DAY 62 AM PT ROUNDUP: Shomera drone 12 IDF wounded. Maritime Freedom Construct launched. Trump threatens Germany troops. Khamenei: 'new chapter for Hormuz.' Pezeshkian: blockade 'doomed.' Von der Leyen: EU EUR 500M/day. Lebanon DT 2,576. Brent $126.10. Gas $4.23. War Powers deadline TODAY.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, US News/Reuters, NPR, The News Intl, Al Arabiya, Bloomberg, WAFA. All cross-verified.
